name: mostGetHWCapability
title: mostGetHWCapability
description: mostGetHWCapability() can be used to query the properties of the MOST interface used.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel of the connected interface.

parameters.name: ID
parameters.description: Description of the Return Value

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_MaxNumberOfInstances = 0
parameters.description: Number of interfaces of this type being used simultaneously

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_MaxWriteOS8104Registers = 1
parameters.description: Number of OS8104 registers that can be written with a command

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_MaxReadOS8104Registers = 2
parameters.description: Number of OS8104 registers that can be read with a command

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_TwinklePowerLed = 3
parameters.description: 1: The mostTwinklePowerLed command functions with the interface

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_LightLockStress = 4
parameters.description: 1: The mostGenerateLightError and mostGenerateLockError commands function with the interface

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_CtrlNode = 8
parameters.description: 1: Can be operated in Node Mode for the control channel (sending/receiving control messages)

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_CtrlSpy = 9
parameters.description: 1: Can be operated in Spy Mode for the control channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_CtrlNodeAndSpySimultaneous = 10
parameters.description: 1: Can be operated simultaneously in Node and Spy Mode (control channel)

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_CtrlNodeAndSpyEventDoubling = 11
parameters.description: 1: Always generates node and spy message for a received message from the control channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_CtrlRxBufferFullSimulation = 12
parameters.description: 1: The mostSetRxBufferCtrl command functions with the interface

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_AsyncNode = 16
parameters.description: 1: Can be operated in Node Mode for the asynchronous channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_AsyncSpy = 17
parameters.description: 1: Can be operated in Spy Mode for the asynchronous channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_AsyncNodeAndSpySimultaneous = 18
parameters.description: 1: Can be operated simultaneously in Node and Spy Mode (asynchronous channel)

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_AsyncNodeAndSpyEventDoubling = 19
parameters.description: 1: Always generates node and spy message for a received message from the asynchronous channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_SyncAnalogInChannels = 24
parameters.description: Number of analog-in channels (16 bit stereo)

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_SyncAnalogOutChannels = 25
parameters.description: Number of analog-out channels (16 bit stereo)

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_SyncAnalogInMute = 26
parameters.description: 1: Can mute the analog-in channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_SyncAnalogOutMute = 27
parameters.description: 1: Can mute the analog-out channel

parameters.name: kMostHWCap_SyncAllocTableReporting = 28
parameters.description: 1: Reports changes to the allocation table

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
